mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log (user_id, username, operation, http_method, request_uri, request_ip, request_params, response_result, execution_time, status, error_message, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{operation}, #{httpMethod}, #{requestUri}, #{requestIp}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{executionTime}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, NOW())
